prediction.reasoning: Based on Goldman Sachs historical volatility (~25-30% annually) and random walk assumption for 22-day forecast. Point estimate assumes no drift. Confidence intervals calculated using normal distribution with daily volatility of ~1.8%, scaled for 22 days (sqrt(22) factor). Intervals reflect typical stock price uncertainty over ~1 month period for large financial institutions.
